2606.20356.title: Robust $Q$-learning for mean-field control under Wasserstein uncertainty in common noise
2606.20356.paper_summary: In this article, we present a robust $Q$-learning algorithm for discrete-time mean-field control problems under Wasserstein uncertainty in the common noise law. The algorithm combines a quantization-and-projection scheme with a Wasserstein dual reformulation on the common-noise space. We establish its convergence together with finite-time iteration bounds for both synchronous and asynchronous learning schemes. Numerical experiments on systemic risk and epidemic models compare the asynchronous implementation with an idealized Bellman iteration, illustrate the robustness-performance tradeoff under common-noise misspecification, and report the observed convergence behavior of the asynchronous $Q$-learning algorithm.
2606.20356.paper_summary_zh: 在本文中，我們提出了一種針對在共同噪聲法則下的Wasserstein不確定性的離散時間均場控制問題的穩健$Q$-學習算法。<lb/>該算法將量化和投影方案與共同噪聲空間上的Wasserstein對偶重構相結合。<lb/>我們建立了其收斂性，並為同步和異步學習方案提供了有限時間迭代界限。<lb/>在系統風險和流行病模型上的數值實驗比較了異步實現與理想化的Bellman迭代，說明了在共同噪聲錯誤規範下的穩健性-性能折衷，並報告了觀察到的異步$Q$-學習算法的收斂行為。
2606.20356.author: Mathieu Laurière et.al.
2606.20356.authors: Mathieu Laurière, Ariel Neufeld, Kyunghyun Park
